label: eat
groundingNote: someone does something of one kind with the {urn:molecule-v0:mouth|mouth} [m] to some things: for a short time these things are inside it, this someone does something to them inside it; after this, they are inside the body; people do this at many times; if someone does not do this for a long time, this someone dies
notes: NSM-standard molecule-region (bodily action); chewing rendered as 'does something to them there' (teeth [m] unminted).
